allow: Bash(node -c "c:/Users/mfard/OneDrive/AmbVir/Pietro/fabricor de mod 139 Pietro e Manoel/Super Picareta/Super Picareta BP/scripts/main.js")
Bash(node --check "c:/Users/mfard/OneDrive/AmbVir/Pietro/fabricor de mod 139 Pietro e Manoel/Armadura de Slime/Armadura de Slime BP/scripts/main.js")

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "const d=require(\"fs\").readFileSync(0,\"utf8\");try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).file_path||\"\")}catch{console.log(\"\")}" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then EXT="${FILE##*.}"; if [ "$EXT" = "json" ]; then node -e "try{JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(process.argv[1],\"utf8\"));console.log(\"JSON valido: \"+process.argv[1])}catch(e){console.error(\"ERRO JSON: \"+e.message);process.exit(1)}" "$FILE" 2>&1; elif [ "$EXT" = "js" ]; then node --check "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "JS sintaxe OK: $FILE" || echo "ERRO JS sintaxe: $FILE"; fi; fi'
